Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class Company

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Company
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Company extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a company, encapsulating all its core data components such as profile information, ledger, chart of accounts, and the associated data file. This class serves as the top-level container for a company's bookkeeping data.
See Also:

    Description

    Constructs a new Company object.

  • Constructor Details

    • Company

      public Company()
      Constructs a new Company object. Initializes the company profile, ledger, and chart of accounts with default instances. The company file is initially null.

  • Method Details

    • getCompanyProfile

      public CompanyProfileModel getCompanyProfile()
      Gets the company's profile information.
      Returns:
      The CompanyProfileModel associated with this company.

    • getLedger

      public Ledger getLedger()
      Gets the company's ledger, which contains all financial transactions.
      Returns:
      The Ledger for this company.

    • setLedger

      public void setLedger(Ledger ledger)
      Sets the company's ledger.
      Parameters:
      ledger - The Ledger to set. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if ledger is null.

    • getChartOfAccounts

      public ChartOfAccounts getChartOfAccounts()
      Gets the company's chart of accounts.
      Returns:
      The ChartOfAccounts for this company.

    • setChartOfAccounts

      public void setChartOfAccounts(ChartOfAccounts chart)
      Sets the company's chart of accounts.
      Parameters:
      chart - The ChartOfAccounts to set. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if chart is null.

    • setCompanyProfileModel

      public void setCompanyProfileModel(CompanyProfileModel created)
      Sets the company's profile model.
      Parameters:
      created - The CompanyProfileModel to set.

    • getCompanyProfileModel

      public CompanyProfileModel getCompanyProfileModel()
      Gets the company's profile model. This is an alias for getCompanyProfile().
      Returns:
      The CompanyProfileModel associated with this company.

    • getCompanyFile

      public File getCompanyFile()
      Gets the file associated with this company's data. This is typically the file from which the company data was loaded or to which it will be saved.
      Returns:
      The File object representing the company data file, or null if no file has been associated with this company object.

    • setCompanyFile

      public void setCompanyFile(File companyFile)
      Sets the file associated with this company's data. This is typically the file from which the company data was loaded or to which it will be saved.
      Parameters:
      companyFile - The company data file. Can be null if no file is associated.

    • getParentFile

      public File getParentFile()
      Gets the parent directory of the company's data file. If the company file is not set, or if the company file does not have a parent (e.g., it's a root directory, though unlikely for a file), this method returns null.
      Returns:
      A File object representing the parent directory of the company file, or null if the company file is not set or has no parent.

    • setCompanyProfile

      public void setCompanyProfile(CompanyProfileModel profile)
      Parameters:
      profile -

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the company's name from the associated CompanyProfileModel.
      Returns:
      The company name, or null if no profile is set.
